name: No Current Income
description: Current income does not independently support adult transition.
life_effect: The first wealth task is income discovery, not investment optimization.

financial_effect.reason: no independent income makes buffer fragile

name: AI Product Micro-Income Path
description: AI/product skills can create small paid experiments before a full company exists.
life_effect: This path can turn intervention from pure identity change into cashflow learning.

financial_effect.reason: AI/product micro-income can raise upside before formal employment

name: Credential Threshold Before Income
description: A blocked credential threshold delays ordinary income paths.
life_effect: Finishing the threshold can unlock baseline income even without a perfect career identity.

financial_effect.reason: credential completion can unlock ordinary income but delays the start

name: Service Bridge Income
description: The person's skills may first monetize as service, consulting, writing, or guided use rather than product.
life_effect: A service bridge can build buffer while product identity matures.

financial_effect.reason: service bridge income can stabilize early intervention
